name: Pure Idle
short_description: Become the hand of the Creator in search of lost perfection. Collect the light of millions of stars, sending them into the heart of a black hole to find the one — Pure Idle. 505 technologies, production chains, and an endless path to the universe's most beautiful star.
detailed_description:
Help the Creator find the ideal.

According to legend, Pure Idle — a star of indescribable beauty — is hidden among billions of galaxies. To find it, the Creator decided to gather the light of all other celestial bodies. In this cosmic idle game, you are the one to fulfill this divine plan.

What awaits you in Pure Idle:

  • Dynamic Idle Gameplay: Don’t just wait — act! Drag falling stars with your mouse and guide them into the black hole to turn matter into pure light energy.

  • Colossal Tech Tree: Research 505 unique technologies. Each discovery brings you closer to your goal and opens new horizons.

  • Deep Strategy and Synergy: Build complex production chains and find hidden connections between technologies. The right combination can speed up your progress tenfold.

  • Resource Mining and Management: Manage cosmic flows, mine rare resources, so your influence grows even while you rest.

  • Automate processes.

  • Daily Missions: Complete tasks and daily missions to earn bonuses that accelerate your path to Pure Idle.

  • Dozens of Hours of Gameplay: The journey to the most beautiful star is long. Enjoy the meditative atmosphere of space and deep progression that will keep you engaged for a long time.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Finnish, Arabic, Bulgarian, Greek, Danish, Spanish - Latin America, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Czech, Japanese, Traditional Chinese
